use_cases: Showcasing product features in an organized grid layout for SaaS landing pages
Displaying service offerings with animated decorative elements
Highlighting app capabilities with interactive keyboard-controlled visualization
ai_summary: A bento-style feature showcase section featuring an animated golden angle spiral visualization built with configurable SVG dots. The component includes keyboard navigation support (press 'r' to randomize), pulse effects, and adjustable gradients for creating dynamic product feature displays. Ideal for modern SaaS and dev-tool landing pages seeking an interactive, visually engaging feature presentation.
